project.name: Calendar / CalDAV Demo — Reactor
project.description:
Multi-module reactor for the Calendar / CalDAV companion demo.
Phase 2a of the Calendar component extraction: the existing single-module demo moves under demo/. Phases 2b and 2c will carve out calendar-caldav (headless: client + mapping + service) and calendar-component (Vaadin UI) as sibling modules.
Each module inherits directly from com.svenruppert:dependencies; this reactor keeps no shared dependency / plugin configuration of its own beyond the module list.
